title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Upstox Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Upstox Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Upstox Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Visakhapatnam team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Upstox Asia Pacific Associates:
Upstox Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Upstox Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
